## Why

## How to test

<!-- Manual steps a reviewer can take to verify the change. For UI changes,

## Checklist

- [ ] `go test ./... -race -cover` passes locally
- [ ] `gofmt -s -w .` and `go vet ./...` are clean
- [ ] Added or updated tests where it makes sense
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] Updated documentation (README / docs/) if user-visible behaviour changes
